summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS AND ACCELERATION: Brandon shares details from his recent prayer sessions, stating that he received messages regarding an imminent spiritual and earthly acceleration connected to the upcoming Passover season. According to Brandon, this period will initiate an acceleration affecting the economy, politics, signs, and events surrounding Israel.

WEATHER ANOMALIES AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon details visions concerning severe weather patterns, specifically pointing to the East, including Chicago, Philadelphia, and New York. He predicts unprecedented, record-breaking summer heatwaves in these regions. Additionally, Brandon warns of severe spring storms occurring through April, May, and June, characterized by long-track supercells and dangerous downbursts with straight-line winds exceeding 150 miles per hour. He also mentions glimpses of localized droughts contrasted with areas receiving heavy rainfall and overflowing lakes, which he describes as a sign of mercy.

THEOLOGICAL REFLECTIONS ON GRACE AND HOLINESS: Brandon discusses a personal theological correction he received regarding the balance between grace and the law. He emphasizes that salvation is based on grace and a relationship with Jesus rather than self-righteous works, which he notes are viewed negatively by God. However, Brandon maintains that believers should not use grace as an excuse to practice a lifestyle of sin, urging adherence to holiness and separation from worldly behaviors.

DEMONIC AGENDAS AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon addresses recent violent events, specifically mentioning an incident in Kansas, as part of a broader demonic agenda aiming to cause havoc through mass shootings at parades, concerts, and large gatherings worldwide. He continues to pray for the release of hostages and urges believers to exercise their spiritual authority against these violent plots. Brandon asserts that Christians possess dominion over demonic forces and are supported by warring angels, instructing them to proactively stop these agendas using scriptures like Psalm 91.

PROTECTIVE PRACTICES AND ANOINTING WITH OIL: Brandon strongly advocates for the daily use of anointing oil and the invocation of the blood of Jesus for physical and spiritual protection. He shares his routine of applying oils, such as spikenard and Rose of Sharon, to his children, house doors, vehicles, and even fruit trees to establish a protective barrier against harm, sickness, and severe weather. Brandon parallels this practice with the Israelites using lamb's blood during Passover to ward off the death angel. He also encourages believers to plead the blood of Jesus over flights, personal finances, and wallets to secure safety and financial wisdom.

SUPERNATURAL DELIVERANCE AND ENCOURAGEMENT: Brandon encourages his audience to actively practice their faith by taking daily communion, reading the Bible, and seeking baptism in the Holy Spirit, specifically referencing John Kilpatrick's teachings on praying in tongues. He conducts a comprehensive prayer targeting supernatural turnaround, financial increase, and divine protection over households and marriages. Brandon specifically calls for physical healing from conditions like cancer, acid reflux, hernias, and eating addictions, while asserting authority over the spirit of fear and torment.
rawData: [February 22, 2024]-[What the Lord showed me about Passover]-[https://youtu.be/l-qkCKHzgkE]-[Good morning, family. How y'all been doing? I'm doing good. I just wanted to come on and tell you all some things that the Lord has been having me pray over. When I got in prayer, this is one of the things that he told me. He said, "I want you to watch Passover, for Passover will become a time of even more acceleration." There will be an even greater acceleration at the time of Passover. And then I said, "Acceleration of what?" He said, "My son's return for the bride is imminent." I got so excited because the power of God hit me so strong when he said this. He said, "My son's return for the bride is imminent. It's right there, son. It's about to happen." I felt such an urgency and an anticipation for what God was telling me. He said, "There's an acceleration. You're going to see acceleration again from Passover going into the rest of the year." This will be a time of great acceleration. So even from Rosh Hashanah, he said this would be a time of acceleration. But now he spoke to me and said from Passover to whenever—I don't know, he didn't give me a time frame—he just said this would be a time of even greater acceleration in the spirit realm, with the economy, signs, politics, all of it with Israel. Then he said this to me: "I want you to pay attention to the East." I saw Chicago and Philadelphia, and through the summer, I saw headlines in the news and great heatwaves in the Northeast—record temperatures never seen before in that area. He said there will be record temperatures in Chicago and record temperatures in Philadelphia, and this would be a sign of the weather acceleration, the birthing pains of the earth, things like that. I saw heat like I hate because hot summers are terrible, but I saw a record-breaking summer up in Chicago. I don't know if it's a day of heat or if it's a long stretch. I just saw that it would be record-breaking temperatures for the summer in that area—maybe it lasts a week, maybe it lasts a month. I just saw record-breaking temperatures over Philadelphia, New York, and all up in the Northeast. Then he spoke to me about the thunderstorms again and told me there would be record-breaking wind gusts. I saw downbursts coming out of the storms—updrafts and the wind coming down. Straight-line winds over 150 mph. Not tornadic, but like when a thunderstorm collapses and has a burst of air. I saw 150 mph windbursts coming out like straight-line winds. The Lord was talking to me about storms coming in the spring, and like I told you, long-track tornadoes. Pray—we have authority over this now. I'm not telling you all this to freak you out. There are storms we can pray against and pray a hedge of protection around your area, your neighborhood, and over your home. No weapon formed against you will prosper. Psalms 91 and Psalms 23—quoting those and getting ready because we're in an active time on this earth. He started talking to me about long-track supercells, superstorms that were going to try to happen in the spring through April, May, and June. We're almost there. I just thought it was interesting when he was talking to me about an acceleration at Passover because I was trying to figure out when Passover was. It's at the end of April. That was just one night of prayer. He started showing me glimpses of headlines: glimpses of droughts in certain areas with no rain, and then for some areas, there was going to be a lot of rain in the spring. I saw great downpours, the lakes and ponds filling up as a sign of mercy. He started talking to me a lot about grace. It's something you don't earn; it's something you don't deserve, but it's just by his love. He was really working on my heart about not being so rigid. He was saying, "Brandon, there is a balance where you are not living in sin, but you need to understand, son, that it's not about your works and never will be." Self-righteousness to him is a total stench. The Lord was correcting me because I'm not to be so focused on the law. There's a balance where people can walk out grace. He washed all our sins away, past, present, and future, but it's not practicing a lifestyle of sin. I always want to come across in these videos as a grace man too. I love the Lord with all my heart, and I want to make sure people understand that I don't want them to go to hell. I don't want them to think that they can live a life of sin and still make the Rapture. It's about relationship. I don't have all my stuff together, but where sin abounds, grace does much more abound. I've been still praying for the hostages' release. And I want to tell you all this: we need to be watching. I told you all when we saw that thing happen up in Kansas—those two kids doing what they did—that was part of what I told you and tried to warn you about, about parades and big concert events. Be watchful, be prayed up, pray Psalm 91. We can draw a bloodline and take authority over the demonic agenda for mass shootings so that doesn't happen anymore. It's not just about America; it's a worldwide thing. I don't know if everybody has guns everywhere, but I'm just saying to have wisdom and pray Psalm 91 for protection over where you are at all times—malls, big gatherings, whatever. I just feel to pray over this for protection because I saw a demonic agenda coming to cause havoc and confusion. We have authority over this stuff. That should not have happened in Kansas. We, as the body of Christ, should start taking our dominion. We have massive warring angels. We're too devil-minded, thinking the devil has power. No, we have power and authority. We shouldn't be letting the devil do anything. We have power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means hurt you or your family. Every single day you wake up, pray protection around your children—pray over them going to school or a basketball game. Pray a hedge of the blood of Jesus over your children, taking communion and anointing them. I got this oil from one of the people that follow us. He has an oil company here in America, and I think that's really cool. It's spikenard. He has all kinds of different fragrances like Rose of Sharon; I love them. But spikenard smelled really pretty. I anointed my kids with this. I anoint them with oil. He says he prays over these oils, and I appreciate that. I anoint my kids and anoint them with oil; I put a bloodline over them. I just go over there and put this on my finger and say, "In the name of Jesus, I put a bloodline over you from the top of your head to the soles of your feet. No weapon formed against you will prosper." And every tongue that rises against you, we condemn it in the name of Jesus. I say there are big angels with you wherever you go—on your right, your left, your back, and your front—with their swords and shields drawn so that nothing shall by any means hurt you. I anoint my house with oil, my car with oil, and the tires with oil. I've got oil streaks all over my doors because I make sure the blood of Jesus is applied over my house. No devil in hell can cross that bloodline. I believe in the protection and power of the blood of Jesus. I believe that Jesus's blood reigns supreme. No weapon formed against you or your family will prosper. And even if you are in those places where the devil is trying to do something, you cause it to stop. You say, "No, cease and desist! You're maneuvering right now in the name of Jesus." No casualties. A thousand shall fall at my side and ten thousand at my right hand, but it will not come nigh us. I believe it with all my heart. You have to believe it in your heart. If he did it for the children of Israel with the lamb's blood when the death angel was coming by—which is what I was talking about with Passover a minute ago—they put the bloodline over their doors and the death angel passed by. Those were under an old covenant. We can apply the blood of Jesus over our children, your spouse, and even your flight. When you get on an airplane, reach up there and plead the blood of Jesus over that door. You don't have to be weird about it. Just say, "I plead the blood of Jesus over this flight in Jesus' name. No weapon formed against me will prosper." People on that flight will be excited you're there because you are the salt of the earth. Start walking in your authority. In these last days, anointing yourself with oil, taking communion daily, and seeking him with all your heart is key. Jesus Christ wants to have a relationship with you. He's the same yesterday, today, and forever. He would die all over again today for us. He wants protection for your family. Regarding the storm season, take the anointing oil and apply it over your house and your car. No hell comes near your house. No hailstones, no straight-line winds. You're not going to break my trees. I go out and anoint my trees all the time. I put a bloodline over my trees and say, "This is my tree. I have dominion and authority over this tree. You're not going to touch the limbs on my tree." There's no pestilence or plagues on my fruit trees. I pray over my apple trees and get a great harvest of apples. I pray over my dogs, I pray over everything. The blood of Jesus covers a multitude of sins. People say that to me a lot lately, and I agree. Love covers a multitude of sins. But I also believe we've got to walk in holiness and not be practicing sin or acting like the world. We've got to be more like Jesus and less like the world. It's not hard. People want to argue with me, but if you struggle with sin, just try to follow Jesus. Read your Bible and pray in tongues. If you're not baptized in the Holy Ghost, today is your day. You can be baptized with the spirit, praying in tongues right now where you're seated. It is not hard. He's not going to grab your tongue and flap it for you; you've got to exercise your faith. Faith is an act. You have to act out your faith. God's not going to make it happen for you. By faith, you receive your healing. My camera crashed, so hopefully, it picks up. I had to turn off the microphone because it overheated. It's important that you anoint your family with oil. Fathers, pray over your daughters and sons. It's our job as parents and heads of the house to pray over your wife and your travels. If you're going on a car trip, anoint your car with oil. I believe in God's divine protection, and you're going to need it in these last days. You're going to need to be baptized in the Holy Ghost and pray in tongues. I encourage you to listen to John Kilpatrick's sermon on his YouTube channel about praying in tongues. It's a life-changing sermon. It was at the Church of His Presence, I believe. It will uplift your spirits. I'm going to pray for you all. I don't want to keep rambling; I just tell you this because I care. You can anoint your wallet and your money. I say, "Father, I plead the blood over my finances. I'm a tither, a giver, and a sower. You said you rebuke the devourer for my sake." You provide seed for the sower and take care of me financially. I thank you that I have the mind of Christ when it comes to money so I'm not stupid with my finances. Father, I thank you for wisdom to make it stretch as far as it can. Let's be frugal with what God's given us. God will give you witty ideas to get wealth. He'll show you ideas to make your dollar stretch. I believe it's anointed by the Lord because he loves you and wants the best for you. Bow your head and pray with me. We're going to believe for a supernatural turnaround. You are the head and not the tail. The devil shouldn't be running us over; we should be running him over. Father, right now in the name of Jesus, I plead the blood of Jesus over every single viewer. I thank you that you've sent your angels to keep charge over them. I thank you that no weapon formed against us will prosper. I thank you for the covering of your son's blood. We call favor over their workplaces and housing. We call for supernatural increase and favor over their houses. We thank you that they're healed and whole. We pray a hedge of protection over their marriages and children. I thank you for bringing loved ones home. I thank you for softening hard hearts so they would know you. I call forth people to be born again. We curse cancer in Jesus' name. We call deliverance over them from every demonic activity—acid reflux, hernias, or anything with their stomach, gallbladder, or intestines. We call for wholeness. We call for deliverance from eating addictions. Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law. God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and a sound mind. We take authority over the spirit of fear and torment. We rebuke you and cast you out, for perfect love casts out all fear. I am redeemed from fear today. I thank you that your blood covers us and your Holy Spirit gives us guidance. Show us where we need to be so we're always in the right place at the right time. We are free by the blood of the lamb and the word of our testimony. Jesus paid the price for you to be healed and whole today. You don't have to be bound by a devil. Get the word in your heart and understand who you are. Jesus loves you and paid the price for you to walk in victory. I hope this blessed you and encouraged you. It's not like Chicken Little—the sky is not falling. The Lord is not falling off his throne. He's able to provide for you. Be a tither and a giver, and the windows of heaven will open over your household. Do you trust the Lord with your finances? I sow seeds and believe for a supernatural harvest. Please like this video, subscribe, and click the notification bell. It helps get the gospel to the whole world. People are getting born again and healed off this channel; marriages are being restored. It has everything to do with Jesus. Put a smile on your face and a song on your heart. Jesus loves you, and we will see you next time. Have a blessed day. Bye-bye.]
